mapper.sql: id, user_id, type, weekly_budget_id, threshold, current_budget, spent_money, ratio, report_year, report_month, is_read, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (user_id, type, weekly_budget_id, threshold, current_budget, spent_money, ratio) VALUES (#{userId}, 'BUDGET', #{weeklyBudgetId}, #{threshold}, #{currentBudget}, #{spentMoney}, #{ratio})
mapper.select: SELECT wb.id FROM weekly_budget wb WHERE wb.user_id = #{userId} AND wb.end_date < CURDATE() AND wb.end_date >= CURDATE() - INTERVAL 4 WEEK AND (wb.reward_status IS NULL OR wb.reward_status = 'PENDING') AND COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(t.amount) FROM `transaction` t WHERE t.user_id = wb.user_id AND t.type = 2 AND t.`date` BETWEEN wb.start_date AND wb.end_date ), 0) <= wb.amount AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM notification n WHERE n.type = 'DRAW' AND n.weekly_budget_id = wb.id )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (user_id, type, weekly_budget_id) VALUES (#{userId}, 'DRAW', #{weeklyBudgetId})
INSERT INTO notification (user_id, type, report_year, report_month) VALUES (#{userId}, 'REPORT', #{year}, #{month})
mapper.select: SELECT end_date FROM weekly_budget WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND end_date < CURDATE() ORDER BY end_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `user` WHERE id = #{userId} AND created_at < #{date}
